name: Evo-Stik Polyurethane Wood Adhesive
description:
Experience rapid, professional results with Evo-Stik Polyurethane Wood Adhesive. This high-performance formula sets in just 5 minutes, delivering a waterproof, maximum strength bond that stands the test of time.

Designed for ultimate versatility, it's suitable for both interior and exterior applications. Once cured, the adhesive can be easily sanded or painted, allowing for a seamless finish that integrates perfectly with your woodworking projects.
